name: ethernetPacket::GetData
title: ethernetPacket::GetData
syntax: word ethernetPacket.GetData(word offset, char dest[], word length); // form 1
description: Copies the data of an Ethernet packet to a byte array, char array, CAPL struct or system variable struct.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Byte offset of the data in the Ethernet packet. Offset 0 is the byte directly after the Ethertype.

return: Number of bytes copied to the destination buffer.
